name: GridAI Technologies Corp.
summary: PARTI Overview We are engaged in the research and development of targeted, non-systemic therapies for the treatment of patients with gastrointestinal ( GI ) diseases. Non-systemic therapies are non-absorbable drugs that act locally, i.e., in the intestinal lumen, skin or mucosa, without reaching an individuals systemic circulation. In May 2024, we changed our name from First Wave Biopharma, Inc. to Entero Therapeutics, Inc. We are currently focused on developing the biologic Adrulipase, a recomb...
